title: rubus hasskarlii
intro: Rubus hasskarlii, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus hasskarlii include its ability to help manage diabetes, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Rubus hasskarlii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
